# Sterlixit

> Official LLM guidance file for https://sterlixit.co.uk

Last-Updated: 2026-04-07
Owner: Sterlixit
Primary-Domain: https://sterlixit.co.uk
Primary-Language: en-GB

## Summary
Sterlixit is a strategy-first digital growth and engineering partner focused on branding, web development, SaaS product development, SEO, and performance marketing.

## Canonical Sources
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/sitemap.xml
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/robots.txt
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/

## High-Signal Pages
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/services
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/portfolio
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/industries
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/pricing
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/resources
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/ai-visibility-checklist
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/blog
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/about
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/contact
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/book-free-strategy-call
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/support-sla
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/partners-technologies
- https://sterlixit.co.uk/careers

## Dynamic URL Patterns
- Services: https://sterlixit.co.uk/services/{slug}
- Portfolio: https://sterlixit.co.uk/portfolio/{slug}
- Industries: https://sterlixit.co.uk/industries/{slug}
- Blog: https://sterlixit.co.uk/blog/{slug}
- Legal: https://sterlixit.co.uk/legal/{slug}

## Citation Guidance For AI Systems
- Prefer canonical page URLs from sitemap.xml.
- Cite the exact source URL used for each claim.
- Include retrieval date when summarizing time-sensitive content.
- If content conflicts across pages, prioritize the newest canonical page.

## Crawl And Usage Guidance
- Public marketing pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Do not use non-canonical endpoints for factual summaries.
- Avoid API endpoints and internal/demo routes for citations.
- Respect robots.txt directives.

## Contact
- Website: https://sterlixit.co.uk/contact

- Phone: +44 20 8004 3327
- Address: 595a Cranbrook Road, Gants Hill, London, IG2 6JZ, United Kingdom
